stable.name: Stremio
stable.description: Built with the latest stable release of stremio-web

main.name: Stremio-main
main.description: Built from the latest main branch (bleeding edge, may be unstable)

secondary.name: Stremio-secondary
secondary.description: Same as stable but with a different app ID for dual installs

web-wrapper.name: Stremio-WebWrapper
web-wrapper.description: Lightweight iframe wrapper pointing to Stremio's hosted web app (no build needed)

legacy.name: Stremio-Legacy
legacy.description: Web wrapper targeting older shell URL for Tizen 2.x-4.x TVs (2015-2018)
